comment.body:
the problem is that options greeks is a very popular topic now among discord groups and on twitter as much as i can tell.
everybody wants to get the same old cem karsan vibe, when he was talking like if he would be a Dsc.
the influence of options greeks is very well researched, and mathematically it can be modelled.
and it is very conditional. very much conditional.
and its significance is therefore not what ppl usually assign to it
